title: Senior Doctor - Lupin - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Lupin - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
